Search

After Rebirth, I Was Forced to Become the Mafia Princess!

OnGoing
Last chapter:   Ch.704  704, Dust Settles [Thanks to Ailuo who loves eating Nyonya dried meat for the generous "Big Health" gift]
Read
DescriptionChapters
[School Rebirth + Strong Female Lead + Fake Mafia Princess + No Romance + Business Ventures + Countless Suit-Clad Underlings + Dark Exterior but Pure Heart + Empowering Female-Centric Story]

[A rose in the darkness will eventually bloom at dawn~]

In her past life, Liu Yutong was a lawyer. After being reborn, she was mistakenly identified as the daughter of a mafia boss.

Her subordinates were all ex-cons and street thugs, dead set on making it big in the underworld.

To avoid being dragged into their shady dealings and getting swept up in a crime crackdown, she resolved to lead them onto the straight and narrowâeducating them on the law and guiding them toward the light.

In the end, she succeeded, molding them into law-abiding, legally savvy members of society.

But something still felt... off.

Years later, at the companyâs annual meeting.

Liu Yutong looked out at the sea of employees in black suits, standing like a mafia entourage, all bowing respectfully and chanting, "Young Miss!"

Her heart skipped a beat.

"...Did we really go legit?"

.................
OnGoing

Transmigrated as the Male Leadâs Vegetative Sister in a Game Novel

OnGoing

Socially Anxious Little Pitiful Wears the Role of the Male Leadâs Gold-Digging Ex-Girlfriend

Completed

After Marrying the Disabled, I Became the Prime Ministerâs Wife

Completed

The Exiled Life of the Noble Girl
